name: Performance - ChunkRetriever Embedding and Search Latency
description: Measures the latency of embedding creation and Azure Search chunk retrieval in ChunkRetriever.retrieve_chunks.
input: Call ChunkRetriever.retrieve_chunks with a sample query and filter_titles
output: Measured latency for embedding and search operations (trace_tool_call logs)
success_criteria: Both latencies are within acceptable thresholds (e.g., < 2 seconds each)
error_scenarios: Embedding or search operation slow or unresponsive
